CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_ge_25", "TR >= 21 dias", IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_gt_21", "TR >= 21 dias", IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_bt_21_14", "TR 14 a 20 dias", IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_bt_13_7", "TR 7 a 13 dias", IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_bt_6_4", "TR 4 a 6 dias", IF( TEXT(TerminationFlowType__c) = "tt_tr_lt_4", "TR < 4 dias", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Régua
